subcodes.first_line: All things have indeed turned unto God, the Creator of heaven, yet most men remain far removed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد توجه کل الاشیاء الی الله فاطر السماء ولکن الناس اکثرهم من المبعدین قد
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @chastisement and requital, @spiritual transformation, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @station of the Manifestation of God
